---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the friction, gap, or limitation you're running into.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work. CLI examples, config snippets, or mock TUI output are all helpful.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried or other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else — screenshots, links to related tools, use cases, etc.
